development_plan: Skill level: Advanced - fine-tune details and optimize performance.
Priority focus: Address 'Knee valgus (left) - keep knees aligned over toes' in your next training session.
Phase 1: Ball control and warm-up basics
Phase 2: Passing accuracy at various distances
Phase 3: Shooting - focus on hip and knee angles
